examples.title: Source Segregation Algorithm
examples.description: Algorithm to separate waste at source into different categories
examples.code:
ALGORITHM SourceSegregation
BEGIN
 INPUT: MixedWaste
 FOR each item IN MixedWaste DO
 IF item IS organic waste THEN
 ADD item TO OrganicBin
 ELSE IF item IS recyclable (paper/plastic/metal/glass) THEN
 ADD item TO RecyclableBin
 ELSE IF item IS hazardous (batteries/chemicals) THEN
 ADD item TO HazardousBin
 ELSE
 ADD item TO ResidualBin
 END IF
 END FOR
 OUTPUT: OrganicBin, RecyclableBin, HazardousBin, ResidualBin
END
examples.explanation: This algorithm demonstrates the fundamental concept of source segregation where waste is separated at the point of generation into different categories for efficient processing and recycling.

examples.title: Landfill Capacity Calculation
examples.description: Calculate remaining life of landfill based on waste generation rate
examples.code:
ALGORITHM LandfillLifeCalculation
BEGIN
 INPUT: Area, Depth, WasteDensity, DailyWasteGeneration, FillFactor
 
 VolumeAvailable = Area * Depth * FillFactor
 WeightCapacity = VolumeAvailable * WasteDensity
 DailyWeightIn = DailyWasteGeneration
 
 DaysRemaining = WeightCapacity / DailyWeightIn
 YearsRemaining = DaysRemaining / 365
 
 OUTPUT: YearsRemaining
END
examples.explanation: This algorithm helps municipality planners estimate how long a landfill will last based on current waste generation rates, enabling better planning for new facilities.

examples.title: Compost Maturity Check
examples.description: Check if compost is ready for use based on temperature and time
examples.code:
ALGORITHM CompostMaturity
BEGIN
 INPUT: CompostTemp, CuringDays, MoistureContent
 
 mature = FALSE
 
 IF CompostTemp < 40°C AND CuringDays >= 21 THEN
 IF MoistureContent >= 30% AND MoistureContent <= 50% THEN
 mature = TRUE
 END IF
 END IF
 
 OUTPUT: mature
END
examples.explanation: Determines when compost has stabilized and is safe for use. Temperature drops to ambient indicates decomposition complete, minimum curing time ensures pathogen destruction.
